notes: Case identified as 'Appeal of Malone v. Metro New York' in case index, docketed in 2008. This appears to be an appeal of SJC 2007-02 (Complaint of Patrick Malone vs. Metropolitan New York Presbytery), which was decided in GA36_2008. However, the full decision text for the appeal case 2008-12 does not appear in GA36_2008 minutes; the case may have been pending or decided in a later General Assembly.
